info.title: Form Service API
info.description:
A list of form and Xaas APIs.

This page describes the RESTful APIs for Form Service. The APIs facilitate CRUD operations on the various resources and entities used throughout Form service (Custom Resource , Form Definition etc.) and allow operations on them (creating custom resource type , fetch form status etc.).

Some of the APIs that list collections of resources also support OData like implementation. Below query params can be used across Form and XaaS entities.

Example:

1. `$orderby` - returns a result with the rows being sorted by the values of provided attribute.

    ```/form-service/api/custom/resource-types?$orderby=name%20DESC```

2. `page`, `size` - page used in conjunction with `size` helps in pagination of resources.

    ```/form-service/api/custom/resource-types?page=0&size=20```

parameters.name: sourceType
parameters.description: The form source type. It can be 'com.vmw.vro.workflow' or 'resource.action'.

parameters.name: formType
parameters.description: The form type. It can be 'requestForm'.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

post.summary: Create form definition version

201.description: 'Created' if the form definition version is successfully created.

400.description: 'Bad Request' if there are validation errors.

404.description: 'Not Found' if there is no such form definition with the provided formId in the current org.

post.summary: Generate request form for a given library schema.

400.description: 'Bad Request' if JsonSchema is not in specified format

200.description: 'Success' with retrieved or generated custom form

post.summary: Generate request form model for a given library schema.

parameters.name: formId
parameters.description: The request form id, used to find a form from a provider

400.description: 'Bad Request' if JsonSchema is not in specified format

200.description: 'Success' with retrieved or generated form model

post.summary: Execute multiple external actions to get a list of values (for the UI)

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The projectId of the project chosen for the request.

403.description: 'Forbidden' due to insufficient access rights for form viewing or the form execution has not been created. To resolve this, ensure that the /renderer/model API is called first to load the necessary form containing the required external actions.

200.description: 'Success' with a list of external action results

400.description: 'Bad Request' if RunnableItem is not in specified format

post.summary: Execute an external action to get a value (for the UI)

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The projectId of the project chosen for the request.

200.description: 'Success' with the result from the external action

400.description: 'Bad Request' if request body is not in specified format

403.description: 'Forbidden' due to insufficient access rights for form viewing or the form execution has not been created. To resolve this, ensure that the /renderer/model API is called first to load the necessary form containing the required external action.

post.summary: Perform external validations for a form (for the UI)

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The projectId of the project chosen for the request.

400.description: 'Bad Request' if the external validation context body is not in specified format

get.description: Retrieve external resource object depending on namespace type and id

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: namespace in which the vRO type is placed

200.description: 'Success' with external resource matching the search criteria

post.summary: Retrieve external resource value
post.description: Retrieve external resource value depending on provided value source type

400.description: 'Bad Request' if external value request is in invalid format

200.description: 'Success' with list of external resources matching search criteria

post.summary: Fetch form status
post.description: Retrieve statuses of forms specified by reference IDs.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Form type that represents the usage of the form

403.description: 'Forbidden' when the user has no viewer access rights.

400.description: 'Bad Request' if the form ID is not in UUID format.

post.summary: Generate designer elements for a given runnable item.

200.description: 'Success' with generated elements for provided RunnableItem object

400.description: 'Bad Request' if RunnableItem is not in specified format

post.summary: Fetch request form or generate one for a given library schema.
post.description: Fetch a request form from the database, according to the search parameters. Generate one according to the JsonSchema if there isn't a persisted form.

parameters.name: formId
parameters.description: The request form id, used to find a form from a provider

400.description: 'Bad Request' if provided JsonSchemaImpl is in invalid format

200.description: 'Success' with the cusotmized form definition matching the query parameters

post.summary: Generates json schema based on the provided form layout schema

schema.description: Form layout schema this request is made for

post.summary: Get a list of external values.

200.description: 'Success' with a list of external value results

400.description: 'Bad Request' if FormExtValueSourceSearchRequest is in invalid format

post.summary: Generate designer elements for a given request schema.

400.description: 'Bad Request' when the provided JsonSchema is invalid

post.summary: Create form definition

parameters.name: lockForm
parameters.description: Locks the content of the form (layout, schema) making it immutable if set to true, but still allows updates to the form's status

403.description: 'Forbidden' when the user has no admin access rights.

400.description: 'Bad Request' if called with service token with no org.

post.summary: Generate schema for runnable item.
post.description: Generate a ProviderSchemaImpl for the provided RunnableItem. The schema can be used to create a custom resource type.

200.description: 'Success' with generated ProviderSchema for provided RunnableItem object

400.description: 'Bad Request' if RunnableItem is not in specified format

post.summary: Get json object schema for runnable item.
post.description: Generate a ProviderSchemaImpl for the provided RunnableItem. The schema can be used to create a custom resource type.

400.description: 'Bad Request' if the RunnableItem is not in specified format

post.summary: Get form layout schema for runnable item.
post.description: Get the layout schema for the provided runnable item, given that it exists on the specified endpoint

400.description: 'Bad Request' if the RunnableItem is not in specified format

parameters.name: size

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

400.description: 'Bad Request' if ResourceAction is not in specified format

404.description: 'Not Found' when there is no such form definition version with the supplied id and current org.

404.description: 'Not found' if no form with the provided ID.

403.description: 'Forbidden' when the user has no user access rights.

403.description: 'Forbidden' when the user has no admin access rights.

404.description: 'Not Found' no form definition was found for the provided ID.

get.summary: Get form definition version by id

404.description: 'Not Found' if there is no such version with the provided id in the current org.

200.description: 'OK' with the specified form definition version.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

400.description: 'Bad Request'

403.description: 'Forbidden' when the user has no admin access rights.

get.description: Search for form definition by source type, source ID and form type.

parameters.name: sourceType
parameters.description: The form source type. It can be 'com.vmw.vro.workflow' or 'resource.action'.

parameters.name: formType
parameters.description: The form type. It can be 'requestForm'.

404.description: 'Not found' if no form matches search parameters.

403.description: 'Forbidden' when the user has no viewer access rights.

get.description: This endpoint is deprecated. Use `/deployment/api/resource-types` directly from the Catalog Service instead. List all of the resource types in an organization.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

200.description: 'Success' with the list of available resource types

403.description: 'Forbidden' no resource action viewer access rights

get.description: This endpoint is deprecated. Use `/deployment/api/resource-types/{id}` directly from the Catalog Service instead. Get the resource type for the provided ID in the currently authorized organization

404.description: 'Not Found' if there is no resource type matching the ID in the organization

403.description: 'Forbidden' when the user doesn't have view resource actions privileges

200.description: 'Success' with resource action for specified resource type

404.description: 'Not Found' if there is no action with specified ID

400.description: 'Bad Request' if RunnableItem is not in specified format
'Bad Request' if ID is not in specified format

403.description: 'Forbidden' no custom resource type viewing rights

400.description: 'Bad Request' if ID is not in specified UUID format

403.description: 'Forbidden' no custom resource type managing rights

404.description: 'Not Found' if there is no ResourceAction for specified ID

200.description: 'Success' empty body if resource action has been deleted

404.description: 'Not Found' if there is no resource action with specified ID

200.description: 'Success' RunnableItem corresponding to the resource action

404.description: 'Not Found' if there is no resource action with specified ID
'Not Found' if there is no resource action for specified ID

403.description: 'Forbidden' no resource action viewer access rights

200.description: 'Success' with form for ResourceAction with specified ID

get.summary: Get binding action for given action resource type and external input type.

200.description: 'Success' with the BindingAction for the given resourceTYpe and externalType

delete.description: Delete the form with the specified sourceType, sourceId and formType.

parameters.name: sourceType
parameters.description: The form source type. It can be 'com.vmw.vro.workflow' or 'resource.action', or 'com.vmw.blueprint.version'.

parameters.name: formType
parameters.description: The form type. It can be 'requestForm'.

400.description: 'Bad Request'

403.description: 'Forbidden' when the user has no admin access rights.

404.description: 'Not Found' if no form definition is found.
